summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for iteration 2 landing page updates. Verified Team section removal, all clickable elements with external links, ArrowUpRight icons on hover, enhanced UI/UX effects, and mobile responsiveness. All 17 test categories passed successfully.
passed_tests: Team section successfully removed from page
Navbar shows 'Contact' instead of 'Team' in navigation
Hero 'Get Started' button links to ethereum.org/en/web3/ and opens in new tab
Hero 'Watch Demo' button links to YouTube video and opens in new tab
All 4 Problem stat cards are clickable with external links opening in new tabs
All 5 Feature cards are clickable with ArrowUpRight icons on hover and external links
All 4 How It Works timeline steps are clickable with external links
All 3 Impact cards are clickable with hover effects and external links
All 4 Business Model cards are clickable with ArrowUpRight icons and external links
All 4 SWOT cards are clickable with hover effects and external links
All 4 Target User items are clickable with ArrowUpRight icons on hover
Final CTA 'Get Started Now' links to ethereum.org and opens in new tab
Final CTA 'Contact Sales' opens mailto link correctly
14 external footer links have correct target='_blank' and ArrowUpRight icons
All sections have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Mobile responsive layout works correctly with proper navigation
All hover effects work (card lift, border glow, icon reveal animations)
